name: threshold-signalworks-keel
description: Structural safety guardrails for AI agents. Policy enforcement, audit trails, approval gates.

plugins.name: threshold
plugins.description: Safety guardrails for autonomous agents. Append-only WAL with SHA-256 hash chains, policy enforcement at the action layer, approval gates for irreversible operations, quarantine-before-delete, and blast-radius caps. Works as behavioural guardrails from the SKILL.md alone, or install the CLI for cryptographic audit trails.
